name: Microwave Beer Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients.
2. Spray a glass loaf pan with cooking spray and sprinkle the bottom and sides with cornflake crumbs.
3. Pour batter into the prepared pan and top with butter and a light sprinkling of cornflake crumbs.
4. Microwave on MEDIUM for 9 minutes, then on HIGH for 2 minutes.
